news.title: CPT Tours: First Booking in 9 Days
news.description: South African tour excursion provider CPT Tours secured their first online booking just 9 days after their new site went live, demonstrating immediate ROI.

news.title: Bay Motors: SEO Success in Harwich
news.description: Bay Motors reached the first page of Google within 3 weeks of launch. They are now the top-listed mechanics in Harwich thanks to our intensive SEO work.

news.title: English Open 2025: Record Turnout
news.description: The English Open 2025 reports its largest turnout yet, with registrations handled seamlessly through our optimised digital infrastructure.

news.title: Analytics: Massive Traffic Growth
news.description: Google Analytics data reveals huge traffic spikes and a massive increase in engagement since the new site was built, highlighting the power of optimised UI/UX.

news.title: Boulevard Logistics: Streamlined Operations
news.description: New custom pricing software for Boulevard Logistics has eliminated manual spreadsheet calculations, resulting in a 75% reduction in admin time.
